identity.name: AK Fashion House - Retail OS
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Retail Utility with Fashion Editorial aesthetics.
Content is King: Data legibility is paramount for cashiers.
Contrast: High contrast for readability in bright store environments.
Speed: Interactions must be instant (POS requirement).

usage.label: font-body text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-700 hover:bg-indigo-800 text-white shadow-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm font-medium

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 font-semibold uppercase text-xs tracking-wider

general: Use 'Outfit' font for all headings and 'Public Sans' for body text.
Implement a clean, white-dominant theme with Indigo (#4338ca) as the primary brand color.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds; use solid colors or subtle patterns.
Ensure the app is fully responsive, but optimize the POS/Billing screen for desktop/tablet landscape usage.

login.layout: Split screen. Left: High-quality fashion store image. Right: Clean login form.
rules: Show ONLY 'Cashier' login fields initially or as the primary view.

Do NOT display Admin credentials or an obvious 'Admin Login' link that distracts cashiers. (Admin can login via same form or a hidden/subtle toggle if needed, but prompt says 'Show ONLY cashier credentials').

content: Display ONLY: Total Sales Amount (All Time) and Monthly Sales Amount (Current Month).
Use large, bold typography for the numbers.
Add a subtle trend indicator (e.g., +5% from last month) if data allows, but keep it minimal.

billing.layout: Two-column layout. Left (70%): Product Search/Scan & List. Right (30%): Bill Summary & Checkout.
features: Barcode scanner input must be auto-focused.
Bill Summary MUST show: Subtotal, GST (18%), and Total Amount.
Use a clear, high-contrast 'Process Sale' button.

products.layout: Full-width data table with filters on top.
rbac_rules: ADMIN: See ALL columns (Name, Barcode, Category, Price, Purchase Price, Stock). Can Add/Edit/Delete. Can Import/Export.
CASHIER: See RESTRICTED columns (Name, Barcode, Category, Price, Stock). NO Purchase Price. Read-only access.

settings.access: ADMIN ONLY. Completely hidden from Cashier navigation.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays/modals.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles (sharp or slightly rounded).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays can be used for the sidebar or auth backgrounds.
